arrow_keys: Arrow keys: Move around the board
number_keys: Number keys: Write a note or set the sudoku number
show_circle_menu: Show circle menu when a cell is clicked (desktop only)
show_occurrences: Show occurrences of numbers in number buttons
about_text: This sudoku app is and will be free of charge, free of ads and free of tracking. This is a
about_intelligence: , created by Tom Nick, with added intelligence (e.g. hints, analysis, etc) based on
collection_finished: Congratulations! You arrived at the end of collection "{{collection}}". Select a new sudoku to play.
no_sudokus_in_collection: There are no sudokus in this collection. Add one by clicking the 'Add sudoku' button.
cannot_delete_base_collection: You cannot delete the base collection.
confirm_new_game: You are currently playing sudoku {{currentCollectionName}} #{{currentIndex}}, do you want to pause it and start {{newCollectionName}} #{{newIndex}}?
confirm_delete_collection: Are you sure you want to delete collection "{{collection}}"? This will delete all sudokus in it.
import_sudoku_prompt: Paste a sudoku (81 characters, using 0 or . for empty cells):
add_your_own_sudoku: Add your own sudoku. Set the numbers and you can play it. This sudoku will be added to the "{{collection}}" collection.
select_game_subtitle: Select a new sudoku to play or continue with an already started game.
enter_new_collection_name: Enter the name of the new sudoku collection:
confirm_clear: Are you sure you want to restart this game? Your progress will be lost.
hint_generic: There's a logical next move here using the {{name}} technique.
hint_tech_FULL_HOUSE: Only one cell is left empty in a row, column or box — it must hold the last missing digit.
hint_tech_NAKED_SINGLE: One empty cell has only a single candidate left, so that digit must go there.
hint_tech_HIDDEN_SINGLE: Within a row, column or box there is only one cell where a particular digit can still go.
hint_tech_LOCKED_CANDIDATES_1: In one box a digit is confined to a single line, so it can be removed from the rest of that line.
hint_tech_LOCKED_CANDIDATES_2: In one line a digit is confined to a single box, so it can be removed from the rest of that box.
hint_tech_LOCKED_CANDIDATES: A digit is confined to the overlap of a box and a line, so it can be removed elsewhere.
hint_tech_NAKED_PAIR: Two cells in a unit share the same two candidates, so those digits can be removed from the other cells.
hint_tech_NAKED_TRIPLE: Three cells in a unit share the same three candidates, so those digits can be removed from the other cells.
hint_tech_NAKED_QUADRUPLE: Four cells in a unit share the same four candidates, so those digits can be removed from the other cells.
hint_tech_HIDDEN_PAIR: Two digits appear in only two cells of a unit, so the other candidates in those cells can be removed.
hint_tech_HIDDEN_TRIPLE: Three digits appear in only three cells of a unit, so the other candidates in those cells can be removed.
hint_tech_HIDDEN_QUADRUPLE: Four digits appear in only four cells of a unit, so the other candidates in those cells can be removed.
hint_tech_LOCKED_PAIR: Two cells in the overlap of a box and a line share two candidates, eliminating them elsewhere.
hint_tech_LOCKED_TRIPLE: Three cells in the overlap of a box and a line share three candidates, eliminating them elsewhere.
